auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your schedule
auth.googleMock: Google sign-in is a UI mockup — use email login
auth.registerSubtitle: Start organizing your semester in minutes
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.resetSent: Check your inbox for reset instructions.
auth.resetToast: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please verify your email before signing in
auth.apiKeyError: Supabase API key missing. Check .env (VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY), restart npm run dev, and see docs/SUPABASE_GMAIL_SMTP.md
auth.callbackNoSession: Could not complete sign-in. Try logging in manually.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to your Gmail/email. Click the link to activate your ClassFlow account.
verify.step1: Open your inbox (check Gmail, including Spam/Promotions)
verify.step2: Find the email from Supabase / ClassFlow and click "Confirm your mail"
verify.step3: Return here and sign in — your schedule setup will begin
verify.resendFailed: Could not resend. Try again later.
verify.checkSpam: Didn't receive it? Check spam or
verify.noEmail: Email address not found. Please register again.

setup.title: Set up your class
setup.subtitle: Choose your class group and cohort year. We'll load a ready-made schedule template you can customize.
setup.asprakDesc: Enables "Teaching" schedule type when adding classes

landing.heroSubtitle: ClassFlow brings the polish of Linear and the clarity of Google Calendar to academic scheduling. Plan smarter, stress less.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for how you actually learn
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every feature follows Nielsen's usability heuristics — visible status, error prevention, and recognition over recall.
landing.smartSchedulingDesc: Weekly, daily, and agenda views with drag-and-drop.
landing.conflictDetectionDesc: Never double-book again — instant overlap warnings.
landing.collaborationDesc: Share, export, and invite classmates in seconds.
landing.privateSecureDesc: Your data is stored securely in Supabase.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to flow through your semester?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of students and educators. No credit card. No catch.
landing.footerDesc: Beautiful class scheduling for students, teachers, schools, and communities. Built with care and accessibility in mind.

features.title: Everything you need to
features.subtitle: ClassFlow combines premium SaaS aesthetics with academic scheduling tools that actually respect your time.
features.heuristicsSubtitle: Every interaction in ClassFlow is designed against these principles.

pricing.title: Simple, honest
pricing.subtitle: ClassFlow is built with free, open-source tools. We believe scheduling shouldn't cost students a dime.

dashboard.noClassesToday: No classes today — enjoy your free time!

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Drag classes to reschedule · Click to edit

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your ClassFlow experience
settings.focusModeDesc: Minimal distractions in the app shell
settings.inviteCopied: Invite link copied — share with classmates

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Your beautiful hub for classes, assignments, and focus time.
onboarding.manageDesc: Add classes, detect conflicts, and drag events on the calendar.
onboarding.shortcuts: Work at the speed of thought
onboarding.shortcutsDesc: Press ⌘K for the command palette, ⌘N to add a class instantly.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

toast.pomodoroComplete: Pomodoro complete! Take a well-deserved break.

faq.a1: Yes. ClassFlow is built with free, open-source technologies. Core features are free for students, teachers, and communities.
faq.a2: With Supabase, your schedule syncs online. Cached data may be available briefly when offline.
faq.a3: Absolutely. When you add or move a class, ClassFlow warns you if times overlap.
faq.a4: Export to PDF, image, or share a public link with classmates and colleagues.
